section.class: cm comments-shell rounded-theme border border-border bg-surface/50 p-4 md:p-6

div.class: rounded-theme border border-dashed border-border bg-bg/50 px-4 py-6 text-center text-sm text-muted
div.p: Comments are closed for this post.

div.class: cmTtl comments-header mb-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-border pb-4

span.class: inline-flex min-w-6 items-center justify-center rounded-full border border-border bg-bg px-2.5 py-1 text-[11px] font-semibold text-muted

div.class: rounded-theme border border-dashed border-border bg-bg/40 px-4 py-6 text-center text-sm text-muted
div.p: Be the first to leave a comment.
